rules.description: Must call TeamCreate (not just Agent tool) to create the team. The team_name must be derived from the objective.
Must call TaskCreate with outcome-focused subjects. Subjects like 'standby', 'waiting', or 'ready' are forbidden.
The lead must NOT use Write, Edit, or code-modifying tools directly. The lead's role is coordination only — all implementation must be delegated to teammates.
Must read .claude/map.md and .claude/design.md (via Read tool) BEFORE spawning agents. If files exist, their content must appear in the agent spawn prompts.
Agent spawn prompts must instruct teammates to include file:line references for all changes and findings.
The lead must NOT call TeamDelete or clean up the team after spawning. The team must remain active.
The report to the user must include: team name, roles with task counts, and a note that the team will stay active.
